what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment in the dragnet-development channel to a board item target.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-48cd6801
No body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: file is purely metadata with no explanatory content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter delimited by --- in a Markdown file
References an external board item via a board:// identifier
concerns: No context about what the board item is or why it is attached
Standalone meaning is minimal without the referenced board item
notes: A bare channel attachment stub that points to a board item but carries no content of its own.
questions: What message or conversation does this attachment belong to?
Why was this attachment created and what does board_items signify?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be a typed link record between a channel attachment and a board item; its actual content matches that purpose, though it contains no descriptive payload.
intention_signals: It seems intended to persist a reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item so the relationship can be discovered later.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme as the target of a channel attachment metadata record.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed anchor that records a relationship between a channel attachment and a board item, preserving the link for fused querying.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file named att-7a7418cc.md in dragnet-development records a board_items link to board://item-48cd6801 with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to maintain a persistent, typed reference from a channel attachment to a board item.
